candidates.name: llm_alpha12_plus
candidates.description: Extend the only proven R57 win direction: a barely-stronger iter2 state12 alpha lift, touching nothing else.
candidates.rationale: R57 improved dKg_xx/max with a 12-only alpha micro-guard; first LLM step is to test an even smaller same-direction nudge before trying orthogonal knobs.

candidates.name: llm_prior12_micro
candidates.description: Keep the R57 alpha/lever stack and add only a tiny iter2 state12 prior-diagonal opening.
candidates.rationale: If state12 is still slightly under-moving, a microscopic prior widening may help dKg_xx without perturbing the preserved 15/16/20/21 route.

candidates.name: llm_q12_dynlate_micro
candidates.description: Keep R57 intact, but add a nearly invisible iter2 state12 dynamic/late Q lift.
candidates.rationale: If the remaining xx drift is mostly in the commit/late phase, a tiny Q increase might unlock state12 correction more selectively than more alpha.

candidates.name: llm_alpha12_plus_lever_plus
candidates.description: Pair the slightly stronger state12 alpha lift with an equally tiny lever confirmation.
candidates.rationale: Tests whether xx/max and mean can move together by combining the proven state12 path with a near-no-op rx_y/ry_z confirmation, still within narrow bounds.
